=== SECTION: CHARGE ===

R v Morgan Reid

Statement of Offence:
Burglary in a dwelling, contrary to section 9(1)(b) of the Theft Act 1968.

Particulars of Offence:
On 5 January 2026 at 14 Oakwood Drive, Northgate, entered as a trespasser and stole jewellery and cash.

Co-defendant: Tara Vale (separate attribution — see MG6C)

=== SECTION: MG5 ===

Headline Summary
Co-defendant Tara Vale interview summary is served. Target defendant Morgan Reid interview summary, transcript, and audio are outstanding. Co-defendant material must not be imported into Morgan Reid's account without segregation.
